Everything your salon website needs

Custom Design

Bespoke designs that perfectly reflect your salon's brand and personality

📱

Mobile-First

Booking Integration

Seamlessly connect with your booking system to take appointments 24/7

Everything included in your website

Custom homepage with hero section and service showcase
Services page with detailed treatment descriptions
Online booking integration with your preferred system
Team/staff profiles and bio pages
Gallery to showcase your best work
Google Maps integration and contact page
SSL certificate and secure hosting setup
3 months of post-launch support

Our Process

1

Discovery Call

We learn about your salon, brand, and goals

2

Design Concepts

We create custom mockups for your review

3

Development

We build your site with the approved design

4

Launch & Support

We launch your site and provide ongoing support
